home.title: Home
home.hero: Private Alpine Estate for Exclusive Stays, Weddings & Gatherings
home.intro: This is not a hotel. This is a private alpine estate reserved in full for exclusive stays, weddings, retreats, and meaningful gatherings.

about.title: About
about.hero: A Private Alpine Address, Held Entirely for You
about.intro: Fletschhorn is repositioned as a full estate experience: privacy, mountain atmosphere, and alpine hospitality for groups who want the property to themselves.

property.title: The Property
property.hero: The Full Estate: 14 Rooms & Suites, Spa, Dining and Gathering Spaces
property.intro: A whole-property rental with 14 rooms and suites, private lounges, wellness spaces, dining room, professional kitchen possibilities, and capacity for up to 67 guests by arrangement.

experiences.title: Experiences
experiences.hero: Slow Alpine Days and Hosted Mountain Experiences
experiences.intro: Skiing, hiking, wellness, local villages, seasonal rituals, retreat programming, celebration weekends, and private group experiences in the Saas valley.

location.title: Location
location.hero: Saas-Fee / Saas-Balen: A Private Swiss Alpine Setting
location.intro: A practical luxury location page covering arrival by car, train, transfers, nearby villages, mountain experiences, and a map placeholder.

contact-booking.title: Contact & Booking
contact-booking.hero: Request Availability for the Full Estate
contact-booking.intro: An inquiry-first flow: share dates, guests and occasion; the team confirms availability and pricing; then finalize the exclusive estate booking.

weddings-events.title: Weddings & Events
weddings-events.hero: A Private Swiss Estate for Wedding Weekends, Retreats and Celebrations
weddings-events.intro: Multi-day wedding weekends, private celebrations, corporate and wellness retreats, family gatherings, dining moments, and full-property event hospitality.
